column3: text: Note: You could enter arbitrary values for width and depth.

text: Note: Use default logic cell implementation style results in memories that write on the rising edge of
the write clock and have continuous read. This style is smaller and faster but is not
fully compatible with the Stratix M512 emulation style.

text: Note: Use Stratix MS12 emulation logic cell implementation style results in memories that internally write on the
falling edge of the write clock and read only on the rising edge of the read clock.

column2: group: Which ports should be registered?

column4:
text: You can create an addressstall port to act as an extra active low clock enable input for the address register.
This only affects the loading of address registers and not the related
read or write operation.
